rules: Amber (#F59E0B) is used ONLY for primary actions, active states, and critical accents. Limit usage to maintain impact.
Background uses a subtle grid pattern.
Never use pure black or pure white; always use the provided tinted neutrals.

fonts.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

hierarchy.H1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none

general: NO bouncy animations. NO centered layouts.
Asymmetric grid layouts. Professional analyst aesthetic.
Padding scale should be generous: p-6, p-8, p-12.

background.grid: Use CSS background: radial-gradient(circle at 1px 1px, hsl(217.2 32.6% 17.5%) 1px, transparent 0); background-size: 24px 24px;
background.ambient_blobs: Absolute positioned divs with heavy blur (e.g. blur-[120px]), low opacity (10-15%), slow keyframe rotation. Colors: Amber and Muted Blue.

screens.input: Asymmetric form layout. Form on left (col-span-8), stats/info grid on right (col-span-4).
screens.interview: Split-view layout. Left: Live feedback panel (30-40% width). Right: Chat interface (60-70% width) with fixed bottom input area.
screens.results: Bento grid layout for overall score and breakdown.
screens.history: Dense, analytical card grid for past interviews.

components.status_pill: Top fixed pill: border border-muted_border bg-background/50 backdrop-blur-md px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[9px] font-mono tracking-widest text-foreground/70 uppercase. Text: AI-POWERED · CLIENT-SIDE | 100% PRIVATE · NO SERVER

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-background font-semibold px-4 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(245,158,11,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-background border border-muted_border text-foreground hover:bg-muted_border/50 transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-error/10 text-error hover:bg-error/20 transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2

chat.user_bubble: bg-muted_border/40 border border-muted_border/50 rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-4 text-sm max-w-[85%] self-end
chat.ai_bubble: bg-transparent border-l-2 border-primary pl-4 py-2 text-sm text-foreground/90 max-w-[90%] self-start

feedback_panel.card: bg-background/80 backdrop-blur border border-muted_border p-4 rounded-lg flex flex-col gap-2

inputs.base: bg-background border border-muted_border rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-foreground/30

rules: Use smooth, linear or ease-out transitions. (ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1])
Ambient blobs should move imperceptibly slow (10-20s duration).

icons_and_assets.usage: Use Phosphor icons for AI chat avatar, voice recording button, and feedback metrics.

testing_and_rules.data_testid: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
testing_and_rules.client_side: 100% client-side. Storage in sessionStorage (active) and localStorage (history). Direct API calls using fetch or @google/genai.
